reasons: Historical contour proof-chain terminals remain the highest provenance-drift risk and should stay frozen.
Current-lane governance terminals are the safest queue for later additive outcome patching and controlled owner rollover.
Prep-only closure is already evidenced in the current lane and should not keep the queue head pinned to the old patch-only move.
Allowing one separate execution-activation task is safer than auto-jumping to the execution-admission artifact or starting execution by implication.
notes: This record decides governance branching only.
This record does not start commit loop.
This record does not patch any terminal record.
This record does not grant runtime admission.
This record does not reopen contours 03, 04, or 05.
